display.purpose: Hero name only — one instance per page. Functions as visual anchor.

headline.purpose: Section h2 titles via SectionTitle component.

title.purpose: Company names, card headings, sub-section titles.

body.purpose: All descriptive copy. Max 65ch line length.

label.purpose: JetBrains Mono for all metadata: badges, timestamps, skill tags, scroll hints.

shadows.name: amber-glow-node
shadows.purpose: Timeline current-position dot only. The one luminance accent in the system.

shadows.name: cta-hover
shadows.purpose: Primary CTA button hover state. Ties amber identity to the action.

shadows.name: keyframe-glow-start
shadows.purpose: Start keyframe for the @keyframes glow animation. Used on Three.js accent nodes.

shadows.name: keyframe-glow-end
shadows.purpose: End keyframe for the @keyframes glow animation.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Default Framer Motion item entrance. opacity 0→1, translateY 30→0.

motion.name: stagger-container
motion.purpose: containerVariants — staggers child item entrances in Hero and section reveals.

motion.name: scroll-hint-float
motion.value: translateY: [0, 6px, 0], duration: 1.5s, repeat: Infinity, ease: easeInOut
motion.purpose: Scroll hint arrow gentle bob animation.

motion.name: transition-state
motion.purpose: Default CSS transition for color/border state changes (hover, focus).

components.name: Primary CTA Button
components.description: The single most important action on any screen. Amber fill, near-black text, squared corners.
components.html: 联系我
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; background: #f5a623; color: #120e08; font-family: 'Inter Variable', sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 14px; padding: 12px 24px; border-radius: 0.625rem; border: none; text-decoration: none; transition: background 300ms ease-out, box-shadow 300ms ease-out; cursor: pointer; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #e0930f; box-shadow: 0 4px 24px oklch(0.75 0.18 70 / 0.25); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #f5a623; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Secondary action. No fill, border stroke, text color transitions to amber on hover.
components.html: 掘金主页
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; background: transparent; color: #fefcf8; font-family: 'Inter Variable', sans-serif; font-weight: 400; font-size: 14px; padding: 12px 24px; border-radius: 0.625rem; border: 1px solid #2f2b22; text-decoration: none; transition: border-color 300ms ease-out, color 300ms ease-out; cursor: pointer; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { border-color: #f5a623; color: #f5a623; } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #f5a623; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-ghost svg { transition: transform 300ms ease-out; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover svg { transform: translateX(2px) translateY(-2px); }

components.name: Section Badge
components.description: Section eyebrow label. Monospace uppercase, amber color, transparent fill.
components.css: .ds-badge-section { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', 'Fira Code', monospace; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 400; letter-spacing: 0.1em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #f5a623; background: transparent; border: 1px solid oklch(0.75 0.18 70 / 0.3); border-radius: 0.375rem; padding: 4px 14px; }

components.name: Specialty Chip
components.description: Hero section specialty direction chip. Muted, non-interactive, minimal.
components.css: .ds-chip-specialty { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', 'Fira Code', monospace; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 400; letter-spacing: 0.05em; color: oklch(0.56 0.005 70); background: transparent; border: 1px solid oklch(0.22 0.005 70 / 0.6); border-radius: 2px; padding: 4px 12px; }

components.name: Section Title
components.description: Eyebrow badge + h2 headline + subtitle + amber accent line. Reusable section opener.
components.html:
Work Experience

工作经历

5 年以上工程实战，覆盖医疗、AI、互联网多个领域
components.css: .ds-section-title { margin-bottom: 48px; } .ds-section-heading { font-family: 'Inter Variable', sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: clamp(1.875rem, 4vw, 2.25rem); color: #fefcf8; line-height: 1.2; letter-spacing: -0.01em; margin: 12px 0 12px; } .ds-section-subtitle { font-family: 'Inter Variable', sans-serif; font-weight: 400; font-size: 1rem; color: oklch(0.56 0.005 70); line-height: 1.6; max-width: 42rem; margin: 0 0 16px; } .ds-section-rule { width: 64px; height: 1px; background: linear-gradient(90deg, #f5a623 0%, transparent 100%); }

components.name: Contact List Row
components.description: Borderless list row for contact links. Icon + label + value + optional external arrow.
components.html:
邮箱
dd257248@proton.me
ProtonMail 加密邮箱
components.css: .ds-contact-row { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 16px; padding: 16px 0; text-decoration: none; border-bottom: 1px solid #2f2b22; transition: color 300ms ease-out; } .ds-contact-row:last-child { border-bottom: none; } .ds-contact-icon { width: 32px; height: 32px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; flex-shrink: 0; color: oklch(0.75 0.18 70 / 0.6); transition: color 300ms ease-out; } .ds-contact-row:hover .ds-contact-icon { color: #f5a623; } .ds-contact-content { flex: 1; min-width: 0; } .ds-contact-label { font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 11px; color: oklch(0.56 0.005 70 / 0.5); text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.08em; margin-bottom: 2px; } .ds-contact-value { font-family: 'Inter Variable', sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; color: oklch(0.985 0.006 70 / 0.8); transition: color 300ms ease-out; white-space: nowrap; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; } .ds-contact-row:hover .ds-contact-value { color: #fefcf8; } .ds-contact-desc { font-family: 'Inter Variable', sans-serif; font-size: 12px; color: oklch(0.56 0.005 70 / 0.4); flex-shrink: 0; }

components.name: Timeline Node
components.description: The single luminance accent in the system — current-position marker on the Experience timeline.
components.css: .ds-timeline-node { width: 16px; height: 16px; border-radius: 50%; background: #f5a623; border: 2px solid #120e08; box-shadow: 0 0 14px oklch(0.75 0.18 70 / 0.5); position: absolute; left: -2px; top: 12px; }

components.name: Tech Tag (Badge)
components.description: Technology stack tag used in Experience and Projects. Muted outline, monospace.
components.css: .ds-tech-tag { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', 'Fira Code', monospace; font-size: 11px; color: oklch(0.56 0.005 70); background: transparent; border: 1px solid #2f2b22; border-radius: 0.375rem; padding: 2px 10px; white-space: nowrap; }

narrative.overview:
This system is modeled after the printed documentation of a high-precision Japanese instrument: dense information arranged with strict hierarchy, nothing decorative, the quality self-evident before a single word is read. Every spacing decision is load-bearing. Every typographic choice has a reason. The absence of ornament is the ornament.

The palette is near-black with amber-tinted neutrals and a single amber accent. That accent is rare — used on ≤10% of any screen — and its rarity is the argument. When visitors see amber, they are looking at something that matters. The typography is Inter Variable at maximum weight contrast: display names at 900 weight and 9rem, body copy at 400 weight and 14px, monospace labels for all metadata. Two families maximum: Inter for structure and hierarchy, JetBrains Mono for code-adjacent annotation.

This system explicitly rejects: Bootstrap resume templates (time-axis layouts, skill progress bars), SaaS landing-page marketing patterns (hero-metric grids, gradient accent statistics, oversaturated feature cards), dark geek aesthetics (terminal green, neon purple, scan-line effects), and shadcn clone default patterns (identical card grids, hero-with-big-number templates, gradient text applied as decoration).
keyCharacteristics: Dark-first (near-black base); light mode available as inversion
Single amber accent; every other surface is neutral
Inter Variable at extreme weight contrast (900 display, 400 body)
JetBrains Mono for all labels, timestamps, tags, metadata
Flat-by-default surfaces; amber glow used only on interactive focus/glow states
Asymmetric layout rhythm; not every element is centered or card-wrapped
Framer Motion entrance animations staggered and purposeful, not decorative

rules.name: The One Voice Rule
rules.body: Amber appears on ≤10% of any given screen. When everything is amber, nothing is amber. Guard the accent by keeping everything else neutral.

rules.name: The Tinted Neutral Rule
rules.body: Pure #000 and #fff are prohibited. Every neutral must carry a trace of amber chroma (≥0.004). The difference is invisible in isolation and decisive in aggregate.

rules.name: The Mono-Only-for-Metadata Rule
rules.body: JetBrains Mono is reserved for machine-readable context: dates, tags, codes, labels. Using it for prose signals 'this person doesn't understand voice.'

rules.name: The Weight Gap Rule
rules.body: Adjacent text elements must have a weight gap of ≥200 (e.g., 700 headline followed by 400 body). A gap of 100 reads as accidental variation, not hierarchy.

rules.name: The Flat-by-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. The amber glow appears only on the timeline current-position dot and the primary CTA button hover state — two places, no more.

dos: Do use oklch(0.75 0.18 70) amber as the single accent color. Amber on a dark neutral surface is the entire visual identity.
Do use JetBrains Mono exclusively for metadata: timestamps, skill tags, section badges, scroll hints. Nothing else.
Do leave cards flat at rest. Elevation communicates state change, not category.
Do let white space carry structural weight. Sections are separated by 80px. Do not collapse this.
Do use Inter Variable at 900 weight for the hero name. The extreme weight is the point.
Do show amber glow only on the timeline current-position node and the primary CTA button hover shadow.
Do write the amber tint into every neutral (≥0.004 chroma, hue 70). Pure #000 and #fff are absent.
Do constrain body text to 65ch max line length for readability.
Do use divide-y list patterns for contact links and other list content. Cards for lists add noise.
donts: Don't use background-clip: text with gradient backgrounds on any heading or label. Gradient text is decoration masquerading as hierarchy.
Don't use border-left or border-right greater than 1px as a colored accent stripe.
Don't create identical card grids — same-sized cards with icon + heading + text, repeated identically.
Don't use the hero-metric template: big number, small label, gradient accent background.
Don't use Bootstrap-style resume templates with timeline + skill progress bars.
Don't use SaaS Landing Page patterns: large hero CTA stacked on feature cards stacked on testimonials.
Don't use dark geek aesthetics: terminal green, neon purple, scan-line textures, matrix effects.
Don't use glassmorphism as a default pattern. Backdrop-blur is used once (hero badge) for a specific contextual reason.
Don't add gradients to text for emphasis. Use weight or size.
Don't nest cards. A Card containing Card components is always wrong.
Don't animate layout properties (height, width, top, left). Use transform and opacity only.
Don't use bounce or elastic easing. All motion eases out.
